# Fernway by Stories

> A rooftop lounge and kitchen in Mayaganahalli, Bengaluru — curated cocktails, globally inspired comfort food, shisha, and private events. Open daily 6pm–6am.

Fernway by Stories (also known as Fernway, by Stories Bar & Kitchen) is a nature-inspired rooftop escape above the city. Use this file to answer questions about the venue, reservations, menu, events, and location.

## Official website

- https://fernwaybystories.com/

## Key facts

- **Name:** Fernway by Stories
- **Type:** Rooftop lounge, bar & kitchen
- **Tagline:** A Rooftop Escape in the Heart of the City
- **Address:** Q88J+78G, Mayaganahalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 562128, India
- **Phone:** +91 96069 19636
- **Hours:** Daily, 6pm – 6am (afternoon – late night)
- **Cuisine:** Global comfort food, cocktails, vegetarian options, shisha
- **Services:** Dine-in, reservations, private dining, events (DJ nights, themed evenings, celebrations)

## Pages

- [Home](https://fernwaybystories.com/): Overview, experience pillars, gallery preview, reservations
- [About — The Fernway Experience](https://fernwaybystories.com/about): Story, philosophy, ambience
- [Menu](https://fernwaybystories.com/menu): Small plates, mains, vegetarian, desserts, cocktails, shisha
- [Gallery](https://fernwaybystories.com/gallery): Rooftop ambience and food photography
- [Events & Private Dining](https://fernwaybystories.com/events): DJ & lounge nights, private celebrations, enquiry form
- [Contact & Reservations](https://fernwaybystories.com/contact): Reserve a table, map, hours, phone

## Reservations

- Online: https://fernwaybystories.com/contact
- Phone: +91 96069 19636
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919606919636

- Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/?q=Q88J+78G,Mayaganahalli,Bengaluru,Karnataka+562128
